/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/brr_player.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/brr_player.dir/src/Player/Player.cc.o CMakeFiles/brr_player.dir/src/Player/main.cc.o -o brr_player  -lm -lpthread lib/raylib/raylib/libraylib.a libbrr_core.a lib/raylib/raylib/libraylib.a -lpthread /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so -lm /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/libSM.so /usr/lib/libICE.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so
